text.title: AI Triage, Classify, and Route Inbound Issues Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of this methodology. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: AI calls 30% of issues blockers. On-call rotation burns out within weeks.
antipattern.root-cause: No on-call confirmation gate on blocker severity.
antipattern.fix: Require explicit on-call confirmation before arming the blocker SLA timer.

antipattern.symptom: Triage auto-closes anything > 0.7 similarity. Real bugs lost in the noise.
antipattern.root-cause: Cosine threshold too lenient + auto-close enabled.
antipattern.fix: Raise threshold to ≥ 0.85 and only link, never auto-close.

antipattern.symptom: Triage applies labels and assigns without a comment. Engineers cannot dispute decisions; trust collapses.
antipattern.root-cause: Audit comment skipped to reduce noise.
antipattern.fix: Force the audit comment; engineers dispute via one-click reactions.
